case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ROBERT HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR REAL PROPERTY ISSUED S.F. COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROBERT ACOSTA, ADAM
WRIT RETURNED & FILED FULLY SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROBERT ACOSTA, ADAM DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROBERT ACOSTA, ADAM
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED NOV-08-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROBERT ACOSTA, ADAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROBERT ACOSTA, ADAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1425 FILLMORE ST., APT #509, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
DECLARATION DAILY RENTAL VALUE $51.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
